title: centella triloba
intro: Centella triloba, also known as Gotu Kola, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the mint family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and neuroprotective effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Centella triloba include improving cognitive function, enhancing skin health, and supporting immune system function. In herbal preparations, Centella triloba is often used in teas, capsules, and topical creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
